name: Bagian teknologi nusantara
notes:
BTN ISP (AS154365) is a regional Internet Service Provider based in East Java, Indonesia. 
We operate a growing fiber-based access and transport network serving residential, SME, and enterprise customers. 

BTN ISP maintains an open peering policy and welcomes settlement-free peering with networks that share mutual performance and resiliency objectives. 
We support Unicast IPv4 and IPv6, maintain proper IRR/RPKI information, and announce only verified and registered prefixes.

For peering coordination or operational matters, please contact our 24×7 NOC:
noc@btn13.co.id
